LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-16-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FEDERAL HOME LOAN BANK OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
